summary: Synthflow-style free trial feature testing completed. All 8 backend tests passed. All 4 frontend trial banner states verified via Playwright (active, warning, critical, expired). Call blocking for expired trial users works correctly (402 response).
critical_code_review_comments: Trial implementation is complete and working correctly
New user registration sets trial_minutes_total: 15.0, trial_seconds_used: 0.0, trial_expired: false
/api/user/trial-status endpoint returns correct trial info including is_trial, trial_active, trial_expired, minutes_remaining, can_make_calls
TrialBanner component correctly shows 4 states: info (cyan, >7 min), warning (amber, 3-7 min), critical (red, <3 min), expired (red)
Paid users (unlimited tier) correctly do not see trial banner (is_trial: false, minutes_remaining: -1)
Call initiation (/api/calls/initiate) correctly blocks expired trial users with 402 status and upgrade message
seed_data_creation: Created test users with various trial states for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Synthflow-style trial feature fully tested. Backend: get_trial_status() at line 3441, deduct_trial_time() at line 3487, /api/user/trial-status at line 3773, /api/calls/initiate trial check at line 7937. Frontend: TrialBanner.jsx with data-testids: trial-banner-info, trial-banner-warning, trial-banner-critical, trial-banner-expired, upgrade-btn-trial, upgrade-btn-warning, upgrade-btn-critical, upgrade-btn-expired.

paid_user_handling.no_trial_banner: Paid users do not see trial banner - PASS

call_blocking.POST /api/calls/initiate: Returns 402 for expired trial users - PASS
call_blocking.error_message: Your free trial has expired. You used 15.0 minutes of call time. Please upgrade to continue making calls. - PASS

trial_banner_states.info_banner: Cyan/teal, shows '15 min of call time remaining' for >7 min - PASS
trial_banner_states.warning_banner: Amber, shows 'Trial running low: X min of call time left' for 3-7 min - PASS
trial_banner_states.critical_banner: Red, shows 'Trial Almost Over! Only X min remaining' for <3 min - PASS
trial_banner_states.expired_banner: Red, shows 'Free Trial Expired' with upgrade prompt - PASS
